title: Cursor provider restored, active sessions manager, and cross-desktop launch hotkeys
highlights: The Cursor provider works again: jcode now talks to Cursor's current agent service directly instead of a decommissioned endpoint that failed with "Update Required" errors
New active sessions manager (/active, or Left on an empty prompt when enabled) shows your live sessions with 'working'/'ready' badges so you can see which ones need attention
improvements: Launch hotkey setup now covers GNOME, KDE Plasma, Cinnamon, MATE, XFCE, bspwm, Hyprland, sway, and i3 on Linux, plus config-driven hotkeys on Windows
The active sessions view refreshes live presence every couple of seconds and labels the session you opened it from
fixes: Cursor chat no longer fails with resource-exhausted / payment-required errors caused by the retired ChatService endpoint
